title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 19 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 19/10/2021
Image reference: 2021-10-19_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-19-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values remained stable. LR2s Navig8 Pride LHJ and Navig8 Providence (110,600 DWT, Aug 2018, New Times Shipbuilding) sold to Global Meridian Holdings in an en bloc deal for USD 96.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 91.18 mil - Inc Charter. MR2s Eco City Of Angels and Eco Los Angeles (50,300 DWT, Feb 2020, Hyundai Mipo) sold to Norden in an en bloc deal for USD 73.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 70.85 mil - Inc Charter.
